arts.sum: Juventus and Manchester City players come face to face before the half-time break at the...

Cristiano Giuntoli, Chief Football Officer of Juventus, spoke to Amazon Prime Video and Sky before the Champions League match against Manchester City, addressing several key topics regarding the club’s current situation and future plans. Giuntoli expressed satisfaction with the team’s performance, stating, “We always want to do more and better. We’re pleased that Motta doesn’t cling to excuses, but objectively, many things have happened. We’re holding on a bit longer and waiting for some players to return. We think little about the outside, only about ourselves. We’ve seen an extraordinary attitude from the boys; they’re giving everything.” Discussing Juventus’ long-term The post Juventus CFO Giuntoli: Conceiçao staying “100%” appeared first on FootItalia.com.
